backend/main.mo: Core Motoko actor for the CyberGenesis Land Mint DApp implementing land registry, NFT minting, token claiming, upgrades, loot caches, and modifier systems using ordered maps and access control.
CANISTER_REINSTALL_GUIDE.md: Step-by-step guide for force-reinstalling the Land and Asset Canisters on ICP mainnet, listing all five canister IDs and the authorized admin principal.
DEPLOYMENT_CHECKLIST.md: Pre-deployment checklist for CyberGenesis covering environment configuration and required frontend .env variables.
DEPLOYMENT_GUIDE.md: Mainnet deployment guide for the CyberGenesis DApp covering prerequisites, canister creation sequence, and asset requirements for all five canisters.
DEPLOYMENT_INSTRUCTIONS.md: Critical environment configuration steps and ordered canister deployment instructions for CyberGenesis.
DEVELOPER_README.md: Developer documentation describing the five-canister ICP architecture (Land, Token, Marketplace, Governance, Asset) and inter-canister communication for the CyberGenesis NFT land-mint DApp.
ENVIRONMENT_CONFIGURATION.md: Reference guide listing all required environment variables for the CyberGenesis frontend, including network and canister ID settings.
ENVIRONMENT_SETUP.md: Troubleshooting guide for resolving 'Asset Canister ID not configured' and availability errors by walking through local and mainnet canister deployment and environment variable setup.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping specific implementation requirements (renderer config, bloom pass settings, composite shader, etc.) in CubeVisualization.tsx to test IDs and component dependencies.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summaries of each frontend source file describing their roles, styling approach, and key implementation details.
frontend/.env: Production environment variable file permanently targeting ICP mainnet with all five canister IDs, admin principal, and stability/retry configuration for the CyberGenesis frontend.
frontend/.env.example: Template environment file documenting all required VITE_ variables with example values for both local development and mainnet deployment.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the CyberGenesis React app with no-cache headers, a root div, and the main.tsx module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that manages app initialization, authentication state via Internet Identity, and conditionally renders LandingPage, Dashboard, or ProfileSetup based on user state. Also handles actor reinitialization progress display.
frontend/src/asset-backend.d.ts: TypeScript type declarations for the asset backend canister interface, defining Asset, UserProfile, UserRole types and the assetBackendInterface with all callable methods.
frontend/src/asset-backend.idl.ts: Candid IDL factory definition for the asset backend canister, describing all service methods including asset management, user profiles, access control, and admin functions.
frontend/src/backend.idl.ts: Candid IDL factory for the main land/game backend canister, defining types like LandData, ClaimResult, LootCache, Modifier, and all service methods for land management, rewards, and governance.
frontend/src/components/AdminGLBUpload.t: Admin-only React component for uploading GLB 3D model files to the asset canister, with authorization checks against a hardcoded admin principal, health checks, drag-and-drop support, and per-file upload progress tracking.
frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx: Collapsible admin panel component for uploading GLB land models, with periodic asset canister health checks, land type selection, file validation, and simulated upload progress.
frontend/src/components/AssetCanisterDia: Diagnostic panel component that runs a suite of tests against the asset canister including actor initialization, network connectivity, authentication, query calls, and cycle balance checks, displaying results and logs.
frontend/src/components/AssetCanisterRei: A React component that provides a UI for reinitializing the Asset Canister, including authorization checks, pre/post health checks, and step-by-step progress tracking with toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/CanisterDiagnost: A React component that runs connectivity health checks against multiple IC gateways for the Land and Asset canisters, displaying results with status badges, response times, and recommendations.
frontend/src/components/CanisterIDVerifi: A React component that compares expected canister IDs against environment variable values for all project canisters, visually indicating which IDs are correctly configured.
A React component that validates required environment variables on load and renders a fixed error banner with a quick-fix guide if any critical variables are missing.
frontend/src/components/CosmicBackground: A React component that renders an animated 2D canvas background featuring a twinkling star field and pulsing nebula effects using a cyberpunk color palette.
frontend/src/components/CubeVisualizatio: React Three Fiber component that renders 3D biome land models with post-processing effects including bloom, ACES tone mapping, sharpening, and an FBM shader background. Maps biome names to GLB model URLs and composes a full scene with orbit controls and dynamic lighting.
frontend/src/components/CyberCube.tsx: Empty placeholder file; all 3D rendering logic has been moved to LandModel.tsx.
frontend/src/components/DeploymentVerifi: UI component that periodically checks the health of LandCanister and AssetCanister by calling their actors, displays status badges, and allows manual refresh with toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/Discovery.tsx: Component for discovering and processing loot caches on a player's land, handling tier-based CBR token and cycle-charge costs, and displaying existing caches with their rewards.
frontend/src/components/ErrorBoundary.ts: React class-based error boundary that catches rendering errors and displays a styled error overlay with the error message, supporting an optional custom fallback and onError callback.
frontend/src/components/Governance.tsx: Governance UI with tabs for staking CBR tokens, creating proposals, and voting on active proposals, using React Query mutations and toast notifications for feedback.
frontend/src/components/LandDashboard.ts: Dashboard component for a selected land plot that displays token balance, cooldown timer, and supports claiming rewards, upgrading plots, and applying modifiers via React Query mutations.
frontend/src/components/LandModel.tsx: Loads and renders a GLTF 3D land model with KTX2 texture support, applying biome-specific PBR material settings (emissive intensity, env map intensity, anisotropic filtering) and auto-fitting the camera to the model bounds.
frontend/src/components/LandSelector.tsx: A UI card component that lets users navigate between their owned land plots using previous/next buttons, displaying the current land's name, biome (in Russian), and position in the list.
frontend/src/components/Leaderboard.tsx: Displays a top-10 leaderboard of lands ranked by CBR token balance, with gold/silver/bronze styling for the top three entries, fetched via the useGetTopLands hook.
frontend/src/components/MapView.tsx: Renders an interactive 2D map using Maptalks.js (loaded via CDN) showing all land plots as neon-colored UIMarkers on a custom game-world image, highlighting the current user's owned lands.
frontend/src/components/Marketplace.tsx: A marketplace UI for browsing, buying, listing, and cancelling land and modifier item listings, with filtering by type and price range, using React Query mutations for all transactions.
frontend/src/components/NetworkDiagnosti: A network health monitor component that periodically pings the asset canister to measure latency and connection status, displaying connected/disconnected/checking states with uptime and failure tracking.
frontend/src/components/ParticleBackgrou: Renders an animated 2D canvas background with 60 floating colored particles that draw connecting lines when within 150px of each other, with cleanup on unmount.
frontend/src/components/PlotCustomizatio: UI card component that allows users to update the name (max 20 chars) and decoration URL of a selected land plot via mutation hooks.
frontend/src/components/PlugWalletButton: Button component for connecting/disconnecting a Plug Wallet; shows a dropdown with principal ID copy and disconnect options when connected.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: Form card for first-time users to enter and save their display name, calling the saveCallerUserProfile mutation with toast feedback.
frontend/src/components/Reinitialization: Full-screen overlay that displays reconnection progress including current attempt count, active gateway, and an animated progress bar during ICP connection reinitialization.
frontend/src/components/ThreeErrorBounda: React class-based error boundary that catches 3D rendering errors, logs them, and renders a fallback UI with a retry button instead of crashing the canvas.
frontend/src/config/mainnet.ts: Defines and exports ICP mainnet configuration including canister IDs, asset URL helpers, Internet Identity/Plug Wallet settings, and utility functions for initialization, validation, and model URL generation.
React context provider for Plug Wallet integration on ICP, exposing connection state, connect/disconnect methods, and actor creation utilities.
frontend/src/data/modifierCatalog.ts: Static catalog of 45+ placeholder NFT modifiers organized into four rarity tiers, intended to be replaced with backend data once modifier management is integrated.
frontend/src/governance-backend.d.ts: TypeScript type declarations for the governance canister backend, defining interfaces for Proposals, Votes, and result variants for staking and voting operations.
frontend/src/governance-backend.idl.ts: Candid IDL factory for the governance backend canister, describing the service interface including staking, proposal creation, and voting methods.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useActorReinitializer: React hook that manages automatic actor reinitialization by rotating through multiple IC gateways with up to three retry attempts and toast notifications.
frontend/src/hooks/useActorWithInit.ts: React hook that wraps useActor with initialization polling logic, validating backend connectivity via multiple queries with progressive backoff before marking the actor as ready.
frontend/src/hooks/useAssetActor.ts: React hook that initializes and returns an ICP Asset Canister actor with retry logic, multi-gateway failover, environment validation, and health checks. Supports both local and mainnet networks using Internet Identity for authentication.
frontend/src/hooks/useAssetHealth.ts: React hook that performs a single delayed health check against the Asset Canister's /health endpoint and returns a status of 'checking', 'healthy', or 'error'.
frontend/src/hooks/useAssetUpload.ts: React hook that uploads GLB files to the Asset Canister via the Plug wallet agent, tracking upload progress and exposing upload state including errors.
frontend/src/hooks/useGovernanceActor.ts: React hook that initializes and returns an ICP Governance Canister actor with retry logic and multi-gateway failover, using Internet Identity for authentication.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing AuthClient lifecycle, login/logout, and exposing identity and login status to the component tree.
frontend/src/hooks/useMarketplaceActor.t: React hook that initializes and returns an ICP Marketplace Canister actor with retry logic and multi-gateway failover, using Internet Identity for authentication.
Provides React Query mutation hooks for interacting with token, marketplace, and governance canisters via Plug Wallet, including buy/list/cancel listing and stake/vote operations.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating land data, user profiles, token balances, and placeholder governance/marketplace operations using Internet Identity actors.
frontend/src/hooks/useTokenActor.ts: Creates and manages a typed ICP actor for the token canister with retry logic, gateway failover, and a 120-second timeout, returning the actor and its loading/error state.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that sets up Tailwind, imports Orbitron and JetBrains Mono fonts, defines CSS custom properties for a dark cyberpunk theme, and provides utility classes for glassmorphism and neon glow effects.
frontend/src/lib/buildInfo.ts: Exports build timestamp/version constants and a cache-busting URL helper, plus a logging function that prints build metadata on app initialization.
frontend/src/lib/debugConfig.ts: Provides conditional debug logging utilities for 3D scene diagnostics, including GPU context inspection, overlapping renderer detection, and scene stability tests, activated via env vars or a query parameter.
frontend/src/lib/modelLoader.ts: File is empty; no content provided.
frontend/src/lib/tokenUtils.ts: Utility functions for ICRC-1 CBR token amount handling, including formatting raw bigint balances to human-readable strings, parsing decimal strings to raw units, adding thousands separators, and checking sufficient balance.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/marketplace-backend.d.ts: TypeScript type definitions for the marketplace backend canister, declaring Listing, BuyResult, ItemType, and the marketplaceBackendInterface with methods for listing, buying, and querying items.
frontend/src/marketplace-backend.idl.ts: Candid IDL factory definition for the marketplace backend canister, describing the service interface including item listing, buying, and querying methods.
frontend/src/pages/Collection.tsx: Page component that displays the full modifier catalog with rarity tiers (Common, Rare, Legendary, Mythic), showing counts per tier and a grid of modifier cards with tier-specific styling.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page that fetches user land data and renders tabbed navigation across Land, Discovery, Collection, Leaderboard, Marketplace, Governance, and Map views with a land selector for multiple parcels.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Landing page with Internet Identity login button, cosmic/particle backgrounds, and feature highlight cards for unauthenticated users.
frontend/src/pages/MintingPage.tsx: Transitional page shown while land data is being initialized, displaying a loading spinner and redirecting to the dashboard once complete.
frontend/src/pages/VerificationPage.tsx: Admin/debug page that renders the CanisterIDVerification component to validate that all canister IDs are correctly configured against deployed IC canisters.
frontend/src/token-backend.d.ts: TypeScript type definitions for the ICRC-1 token backend canister, declaring Account, TransferArgs, TransferResult, MetadataValue types, and the full tokenBackendInterface including balance, transfer, mint, and admin methods.
frontend/src/token-backend.idl.ts: Defines the Candid IDL factory for an ICRC-1 token canister, declaring types and service methods for balance queries, transfers, metadata, total supply, and minting.
frontend/src/types/webgpu.d.ts: TypeScript ambient type declarations for the WebGPU API, covering GPU, GPUAdapter, GPUDevice, GPUQueue, and related interfaces to enable WebGPU support detection without type errors.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence helpers and a function to remove sensitive params from the URL bar without reloading.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom OKLCH-based color tokens, neon box shadows, border radii, accordion keyframes, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
frontend/vite.config.ts: Vite build configuration for a React app targeting the Internet Computer, with environment variable injection, path aliases, a dev proxy to the local DFX replica, COOP/COEP headers for SharedArrayBuffer, and timestamped output chunks with manual vendor splits.
project_state.json: Tracks the current project state and known issues for a 3D visualization app, documenting the render pipeline architecture (bloom composers, ACES tonemapping, composite shader) and a list of implemented features with their requirement IDs.
README_RUSSIAN.md: Russian-language quick-start guide covering prerequisites and installation steps for the CyberGenesis ICP DApp.
scripts/upload_assets_mainnet.sh: Bash script that uploads all .glb 3D model files from a local assets directory to an ICP mainnet AssetCanister using dfx, with rate limiting and upload verification.
scripts/upload_assets.sh: Bash script that batch-uploads 48 tiered GLB 3D model files to an Internet Computer AssetCanister using DFX, then verifies and reports the uploaded asset count and sample URLs.
unknown.txt: Partial documentation snippet referencing a step to test a health endpoint.
